pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic (DASHBOARD_NAME variable)
Task description exact string requirements and verifier.py title_lower checks
Task context involving AWS EC2 instances, EBS volumes, and FinOps
export_result.sh output path and verifier.py RESULT_PATH variable

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real-world time-series data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset, specifically actual AWS CloudWatch metrics (EC2 CPU utilization, disk writes) downloaded during environment setup. The expected dashboard name 'Zombie Decommissioning' and graph titles ('Lowest CPU Instances', 'Cumulative Disk Activity', 'Idle Capacity Percentage') are strictly required by the prompt and explicitly checked in the verifier.py logic. The export and verifier scripts agree on the result file path '/tmp/zombie_infrastructure_decommissioning_result.json'.
